title: Info
caption: Canyonlands National Park, Moab, Utah, United States
copyright: Sunset in Canyonlands National Park, Moab, Utah, United States (© Jason Hatfield/Tandem Stills + Motion)
description: In south-eastern Utah, USA, Canyonlands National Park reveals a vast, rugged landscape shaped over millions of years by the Colorado and Green rivers. Established in 1964, the park protects a maze of canyons, mesas and buttes carved into layers of ancient rock. Divided into districts such as Island in the Sky and The Needles, it offers sweeping views that shift with the light from dawn to dusk.
